title: The Side Show of Life
writer: Ernest Denny, Willis Goldbeck, Julie Herne
actors: Ernest Torrence, Anna Q. Nilsson, Louise Lagrange
plot: Andrew Lackaday, an English circus clown brought up in France, rises to the rank of brigadier general during the war. Returning to his old profession as a juggler, he finds that he has lost his skill. He gives up Elodie, his forme...
